chunks.text: MAK/PS ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Const. Petition No. S-1164 of 2025 __________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) Hearing of Case. 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of main case. 17.11.2025. Mr. Mumtaz Ali Khan Deshmukh, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr. Ali Zardari, Assistant Advocate General Sindh. Ms. Rahat Ahsan, DPG ------------------------------------ Learned counsel for the petitioner through instant petition seeks following relief:- A) The Honorable Court may direct the Respondent No.2 to 6 individually and collectively to not to harass the petitioner unnecessarily and protect the petitioner and his son from taking adverse action against the petitioners without adopting due course of law. B) That Respondent No.7 be direct to provide legal protection to the petitioner, his son and family members and save the petitioner from more harassment. C) Any other relief this Honorable Court deems fit and proper under the facts and circumstances of the case. Also grant the favour to the petitioner to secure from the hands of the respondent No.2 to 6 Pursuant to court notices official respondents have filed their comments, which are taken on record, wherein it is undertaken that no harassment would be caused to the petitioner. Mr. Samiullah, advocate files Vakalatnama on behalf of Respondent No.3 & 7 and state at bar that respondent No.3 & 7 will not cause any harassment to the petitioner. Learned AAG and DPG submits that in terms of prayer clause official respondents shall conduct themselves strictly in accordance with law and no harassment would be caused to the petitioner.

Samiullah, advocate files Vakalatnama on behalf of Respondent No.3 & 7 and state at bar that respondent No.3 & 7 will not cause any harassment to the petitioner. Learned AAG and DPG submits that in terms of prayer clause official respondents shall conduct themselves strictly in accordance with law and no harassment would be caused to the petitioner. Counsel for the petitioner seeks disposal of the instant petition in view of the reply filed by the official respondents and statement made by the AAG & DPG. Order accordingly. This petition stands disposed of in the above terms alongwith pending applications. A copy of this order shall be sent to SSP District West Karachi for compliance. JUDGE
